creator: reg@shale.csir.co.za
text:
Hi,

On Sat, May 22, 1999 at 05:00:01PM -0700, gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/11844'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports. 
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >Synopsis:       Port update: GNOME ports.
> >Arrival-Date:   Sat May 22 17:00:01 PDT 1999

It seems this one was too long to make it through the mail filters... 
Or I deleted it by accident :-).  It's in the GNATS database though.  I
hope this reply goes to the right place.

Regards,
 -Jeremy 

-- 
  |   "I could be anything I wanted to, but one things true
--+--  Never gonna be as big as Jesus, never gonna hold the world in my hand
  |    Never gonna be as big as Jesus, never gonna build a promised land
  |    But that's, that's all right, OK with me..." -Audio Adrenaline
